description: Inline message override — the valid PAREN + STATIC-STRING form parses cleanly (§55.10 Level 1). req("…") and length(>=2, "…") emit no E-VALIDATOR-INLINE-* code — the positive control for the colon/dynamic reject cases.
rationale: §55.10 Level 1: per-field, per-validator, static-string-only inline overrides use the paren form. This case pins that the canonical static-paren form is ACCEPTED (no inline-message diagnostic family fires). ESCALATED (RT half): impl#1 accepts these inline strings but does NOT render them — messageFor falls through to the Level-3 default; the Level-1/Level-2 render precedence is unimplemented (see ss57.progress E3), so the RUNTIME half of §55.10 is impl-gated and not asserted here.
